blended.narrative: Copper Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 10,190 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 4" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.6" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 31".
